session.name: Add Qwen Image Edit 2511 model — PHASE 0 research + mpi-add-model skill upgrade

goal.original: Add a new model, Qwen Edit, to Cubric Vision. Three tiers: Low=4-step Lightning LoRA, Balanced=8-step Lightning LoRA, High=no accelerator. Blocks the head-swap app (MPI-299) in another session.
goal.summary: Committed the PHASE 0 (research+scaffold) upgrade to /mpi-add-model plus the Qwen scaffold (card MPI-300, research dumps, docs/models/qwen-edit/ hub). Model is still in PHASE 0 research — transformer survey + LoRA-strength question are the next research tasks. No workflow authored/wired yet.

completed: Confirmed 2511 is the latest Qwen Image Edit generation (base weights already current)
Found the user was running a MISMATCHED 2509-era Lightning LoRA on the 2511 base
Downloaded version-matched 2511 Lightning LoRAs (4-step + 8-step bf16, 810MB each) to C:/AI/Loras/Qwen
Researched the FluxKontextMultiReferenceLatentMethod node (4 reference_latents_method values; index_timestep_zero = 2511 default but color-shift caveat)
Dep-reuse pass: VAE reuses vae-qwen-image; text encoder qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled is a NEW dep (on G: at 9.38GB); diffusion is NEW
Created card MPI-300 (doing/in-progress) + research folder + docs/models/qwen-edit/ hub
Upgraded /mpi-add-model with a PHASE 0 front-end (9 steps): transformer survey, LoRA survey, sampler research, LoRA-strength axes, dep-reuse, scaffold card, scaffold research homes, local-author gate
pending: PHASE 0 step 4 — LoRA strength axes: does the 2511 Lightning LoRA take MODEL strength only, or MODEL + CLIP strength? (picks MpiLoraModel vs model+clip loader). FIRST ORDER OF BUSINESS.

PHASE 0 step 1 — transformer survey: raw vs distilled variants; quant formats (fp16/bf16/fp8/int8/gguf); full/undistilled weights for the High tier; enumerate all distilled (turbo/lightning) versions + step counts. Write the variant x format matrix.
PHASE 0 step 2 — LoRA survey: quality/adherence LoRAs + de-censor LoRAs for Qwen Edit 2511
Get exact diffusion filename + byte size for qwen_image_edit_2511_fp8mixed (>=20GB hot-store gate) — NOT on G:, lives in user's standalone ComfyUI
Confirm the 2nd '4 Step LoRA' node in the graph (loads base Qwen-Image-Lightning-4steps, not edit) is intentional
User to SAVE the ComfyUI canvas and drop the workflow into comfy_workflows/raw/

completed: Settled hub written to docs/models/qwen-edit/README.md + reference-latents.md
mpi-add-model SKILL.md PHASE 0 upgrade committed; playbook README Phase 0 pointer committed
pending: Known sampler/scheduler/steps for Qwen Edit already known to the user (per the live graph) — capture the exact values into docs/models/qwen-edit/ once confirmed (skips PHASE 0 step 3 for this model)
Decide whether to swap PHASE 0 steps 3 and 4 so LoRA-survey -> LoRA-strength are adjacent (user left this open; skill currently has samplers=3, strength=4)

next_action.description: Find out whether the Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 Lightning LoRA takes MODEL strength only or MODEL + CLIP strength (determines which LoRA loader to use). Then do the transformer survey: raw vs distilled, quant formats (fp16/bf16/fp8/int8/gguf), full weights, all distilled variants + step counts. Dump findings into .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-300/research/ and settle into docs/models/qwen-edit/.

key_decisions: 3 tiers = same 2511 base, different Lightning LoRA per tier (Low=4-step, Balanced=8-step, High=no accel) — combined-op, single-stage image model, flat dependencies[] array
bf16 LoRA-only files chosen (810MB) over the 20GB fused fp8 — apply on top of the existing fp8 base
index_timestep_zero is the 2511-correct reference method (matches GGUF metadata default) but has a known color-shift artifact — flagged as a head-swap knob to watch
mpi-add-model was wiring-only; added PHASE 0 so research+scaffold is enforced, not ad-hoc
constraints: Lightning LoRA MUST be version-matched to the 2511 base (user had a 2509 LoRA mismatch)
R2 uploads + deletes need explicit user approval
Never hand-edit workflow JSON — author in ComfyUI, user saves, re-export
Shared tree: commit by explicit pathspec, never git add -A. Other sessions are editing models.js + MPI-291 + MPI-299 concurrently — leave those
Any single weight file >=20GB => STOP and ask (Pod hot-store gate)

resume_prompt: You are resuming work on adding the Qwen Image Edit 2511 model to Cubric Vision (card MPI-300, in the 'doing' column). Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/8cf229c5-d2ca-4a68-aaad-fb1cd97a0777.json and the MPI-300 research files first. The model is in PHASE 0 (research) of the /mpi-add-model skill — the graph is NOT authored or wired yet. Three tiers are planned: Low=4-step Lightning LoRA, Balanced=8-step Lightning LoRA, High=no accelerator (both 2511-matched bf16 LoRAs are already downloaded to C:/AI/Loras/Qwen). This model BLOCKS the head-swap app in MPI-299 (a separate session). Your FIRST task: find out whether the Qwen-Image-Edit-2511 Lightning LoRA takes MODEL strength only or MODEL + CLIP strength (this picks the LoRA loader). Then run the transformer survey — raw vs distilled variants, quant formats (fp16/bf16/fp8/int8/gguf), full weights, all distilled versions + step counts — and a LoRA survey (quality/adherence + de-censor LoRAs). Dump findings into .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-300/research/ and settle them into docs/models/qwen-edit/. Do NOT version-bump; do NOT hand-edit workflow JSON; commit by explicit pathspec only (other sessions are editing models.js/MPI-291/MPI-299 concurrently). Use mpi-continue.
